name: Dreamcash
description: Dreamcash is a self-custodial trading app that connects to Hyperliquid, offering mobile, web, and desktop clients for perpetuals, spot, and HIP-3 markets—including real-world asset pairs—with AI alerts and rewards. It is published by Supreme Liquid Labs and positions itself as a CEX-style experience with on-chain settlement; the app is not affiliated with or endorsed by Hyperliquid.
